title: Outro (generic fallback) typed transcription
description: Generic fallback for an unknown/unconfident document type. Captures the full raw page text plus best-effort labeled values. Never blocks: only raw_text is required.

raw_text.description: Full verbatim text transcribed from the page (always present).

descricao.description: Best-effort one-line description of the document.

valores_identificados.description: Best-effort labeled values found on the page.
